title: Senior Software Engineer - iGate India Global Group - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - iGate India Global Group - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
iGate India Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About iGate India Global Group:
iGate India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India Global Group!
